title: IIITDM Kancheepuram Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Research Project Intern Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Information Technology Design & Manufacturing, Kancheepuram (IIITDM Kancheepuram) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Research Project Intern Post. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Electrical and Mechanical Engineering can apply for the IIITDM Kancheepuram Jobs 2026 . Interested appli...
